creator: BUGORTN@gmail.com
text:
Number:	154171
 Category:	www
 Synopsis:	User Groups addition
 
 If you know of a FreeBSD user group not listed here, please fill out a problem report for category www with the following information:
    1. A URL for the user group's website.
 http://sites.google.com/site/bugortn/
    2. An email contact address of a human in charge, for use by our visitors and website administrators.
 bugortn@gmail.com
    3. A short (one paragraph) description of the user group.
 BUGOR is an open and free social network of BSD users in the Oak Ridge TN area. Sysadmins, programmers and grizzled old hackers meet each week with gear heads, social engineers and data wranglers of all sorts to explore and debate the intricacies of the  Unix design philosophy and the art of Unix programming while mentoring neophyte users and rehabilitating WIMP users. 
 
 -- 
 BSDuserGroup OakRidgeTN <bugortn@gmail.com>
